subject: docs: sync 8 new patterns from glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Periodic review of cross-project glow-props CLAUDE.md adopted:
trigger system (10 analysis commands), PDF download pattern,
commit metadata footers format, KEEP: convention, two new
prohibitions, bug report ASK rule, and testing guide format.
